final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original brand poster for RAN QIU, designed for premium lifestyle editorial use, in the quiet reverence of wabi-sabi and the poetic restraint of Kenya Hara.

Style/medium: brand identity poster with the meditative stillness of wabi-sabi, the geometric quiet of Kenya Hara's spatial design, and the paper-like honesty of natural materials
Composition: generous breathing room with the RAN QIU mark as centered weight, natural elements placed with asymmetric tension, deep negative space holding the composition
Subject: RAN QIU brand mark as the contemplative anchor, dried botanical elements (seed pods, dried grasses, autumn leaves) arranged as quiet conversation partners
Scene/backdrop: soft warm autumn landscape with shallow depth of field, the golden hour settling over an abstracted natural setting
Lighting/mood: golden hour light — the warm honey of late afternoon, soft diffused illumination creating a sacred stillness
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn russet) in dialogue with #E8DCCB (warm rice paper beige) and #D4A574 (golden brown), a chromatic temperature of harvest warmth
Materials/textures: matte paper grain, the dry whisper of autumn botanicals, brushed linen, soft shadow under each element
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: brand mark must remain legible and centered, color values must remain faithful to the specified hex codes, 40%+ negative space
Avoid: cluttered composition, cold or clinical aesthetic, oversaturated colors, decorative elements without purpose, Western autumn clichés (pumpkins, maple overload)
